explanation: This is the original command and serves as a baseline for testing.
Added the optional '--no-enum-limit' flag to simulate a more complete command line while staying within safe mutation techniques.
Inserted quotes around the executable path to simulate a scenario where the path may contain spaces or special characters.
Reordered the '--healthcheck' and '--level Full' flags, which are accepted in any order by PingCastle.
Used an equals sign (=) instead of a space to separate the flag and its value, which is a valid syntax in some command-line interfaces.
Added the '--server localhost' flag to simulate a more complete command line while staying within safe mutation techniques.
